arts.ttl: Arsenal consider ‘making proposal soon’ – Gunners in contact, big discount from €100m clause
arts.sum: Earlier this year, journalist Jorge Nicola reported Arsenal have made contact for Corinthians’ Breno Bidon. Fast forward to December and Trivela provide the latest on Arsenal’s interest in the 19-year-old. He graduated from Corinthians’ academy and was promoted to their first team earlier this year. arts.ttl: Arsenal keeping close tabs on frustrated La Liga attacker, could snap him up in January
arts.sum: Real Madrid attacker Arda Guler is reportedly unhappy with his situation at the Spanish club and Arsenal would be willing to provide him with an exit route. According to TBR Football, the 19-year-old Turkish international is frustrated with the lack of game time at Santiago Bernabeu. arts.ttl: Ex-Everton midfielder Li jailed in China for bribery
arts.sum: Former China head coach and Everton midfielder Li Tie is sentenced to 20 years in jail for bribery, state media reports.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star ruled out for 10 weeks with hamstring injury amid Mikel Arteta message
arts.sum: “We need a cage there because he [Calafiori] wants to go out, train and play," the Arsenal boss said earlier this week. "Big Gabi has not had a muscular injury [before, but] he is playing a lot now, he is travelling, going to Brazil, he is a starter with Brazil." Takehiro Tomiyasu, Ben White and Oleksandr Zinchenko are also currently dealing with injuries and now a player still on Arsenal's books is set for an extended period out of action.

arts.ttl: Agent reveals Arsenal and Chelsea interest in signing youngster – Work permit proves a barrier
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea showed interest in goalkeeper Vladyslav Krapyvtsov before he agreed to join Girona on Thursday. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who report Arsenal and Chelsea failing to sign the 19-year-old allowed the La Liga side to secure his services. The stopper spent time at SC Dnipro-1’s academy and represented their U17 and U19s. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta and Arsenal 'considering' January transfer after Thomas Partey blow
arts.sum: With his contract running out in 2026, Vlahovic is yet to sign a new deal in Turin and reports in Italy recently speculated that Juve may look to sell their striker either in January or the summer if they cannot get him to agree a new deal on lower wages. After suffering with a number of injuries in recent years, the Ghanian midfielder has enjoyed a revival under Arteta and I believe that the club should look to offer him improved terms.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal preparing January move for €70m-rated front man that’s made Pep Guardiola’s life a misery
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta would appear to be in the market for a new striker, and is set to make a move for €70m-rated Dusan Vlahovic in the January transfer window.
